name: Web page to Markdown conversion
prompt: Convert this web page to markdown: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Markdown
expected_behavior: Identify correct tool for web pages (web-to-md or markitdown)
Handle Crawl4AI server requirement if using web-to-md
success_criteria: Correctly selects tool based on available infrastructure (Crawl4AI running vs not)
Handles missing dependencies gracefully with clear guidance
Produces clean, readable markdown without excessive HTML artifacts
edge_cases: Crawl4AI server not running → web-to-md fails, suggest starting server or using markitdown on saved .html file
JavaScript-heavy pages (SPAs) → may need headless browser, Crawl4AI handles this but static HTML won't render JS
Pages requiring login/authentication → cannot access without credentials
Rate-limited sites → suggest saving page first with curl/wget
